name: The Paribneur Combination
short_description: Make your way through the abandoned establishment of Paribneur Co. As you discover the morbid secrets and chilling creatures of the building. Being forced to find a new way out of the building, you will be faced with hard choices, choose carefully, your choices will affect the rest of the game.
detailed_description:
The Paribneur Combination is a thriller/horror game set in the late 90's. Strange happenings have occured at a warehouse at the edge of town. Local police investigator Darren Wolfe is sent to investigate the old building of a tech company that shut down years ago. Trapped inside, you are forced to find a new exit.

Explore

Explore the abandoned facilities of Paribneur Co, and collect items and clues that will aid you along the way. You have to learn the truth about what happened to Paribneur Co.

Unveil Secrets

Listen to voice logs and read old papers, discover the past. Unveil the true intentions of the shady company. Discover the dark secrets that Paribneur Co. was keeping, and find your way out.

Tread Carefully

Otherwordly entities roam the halls...
